rationale: Bug hunt C14 (faction boost in merlin_card_system.gd): 0 bugs — _get_card_factions, _get_faction_boost, weighted selection all correct. Discovered 2 HIGH bugs: Run3DController.stop_run() never includes oghams_used or minigames_won in data dict, so GFC reward calculation always uses 0 for both. Players were getting 0 Anam for ogham usage and minigame wins via the GFC path. Also implemented run_history tracking (q-20260415-002) — per-run records saved to meta.run_history, capped at 50.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C15 (run_3d_controller.gd counters + store_run.gd run_history). Then feature: one of — GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011), or Ogham HUD activation UI for Run3D, or talent tree UI.
